Beginning at the northwest corner of the subject premises; thence S 89°00'00" E, 250.00 feet; thence S 00°15'00" W, 180.00 feet; thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 400.00 feet and a delta of 22°30'00", an arc length of 157.08 feet, and a chord bearing S 78°45'00" W, 156.07 feet; thence N 00°15'00" E, 250.00 feet to the point of beginning.
